cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. Let me start by listing out all the information given. First, Leslie woke up at 5am. Then, there are several people who saw Leslie doing different activities at different times. Let me note those down: 1. Emily saw Leslie in class from 5am to 9am. 2. Anthony saw Leslie watching a movie from 9am to 11am. 3. Thomas saw Leslie buying cookies from 11am to 4pm. 4. Ashley saw Leslie fixing their computer from 4pm to 5pm. 5. Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. Also, the beach was closed after 10pm. So Leslie couldn't have gone to the beach after 10pm. The question is asking between what times Leslie could have gone to the beach. The options are (A) 5pm to 9pm, (B) 9am to 11am, (C) 9pm to 10pm, (D) 4pm to 5pm. Let me create a timeline of Leslie's known activities: - 5am: wakes up - 5am-9am: in class - 9am-11am: watching a movie - 11am-4pm: buying cookies - 4pm-5pm: fixing computer - 9pm-10pm: walking towards Statue of Liberty Now I need to find out when Leslie is free to go to the beach. The beach is closed after 10pm, so Leslie must have gone to the beach before 10pm. Let me see the time intervals when Leslie was occupied: From 5am to 9am: in class From 9am to 11am: movie From 11am to 4pm: buying cookies From 4pm to 5pm: fixing computer Then from 5pm to 9pm: not mentioned From 9pm to 10pm: walking towards Statue of Liberty So between 5pm and 9pm is a time period when there's no information about Leslie's activities. Leslie might have been free during that time to go to the beach. Let me double-check this. From 4pm to 5pm, Leslie was fixing the computer. Then after that, there's no mention of Leslie's activities until 9pm when Leslie was walking towards the Statue of Liberty. So between 5pm and 9pm, Leslie could have gone to the beach. The beach is open during that time (since it's closed after 10pm). Therefore, option (A) 5pm to 9pm seems to be the correct answer. Option (C) 9pm to 10pm: Leslie was walking towards the Statue of Liberty with Susan during this time, so Leslie couldn't have gone to the beach then.
